narrative:
Monroe Township has 12,350 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
